mapper.select: SELECT t.*, u.username AS creator_name, COUNT(tm.user_id) AS current_members FROM teams t LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON t.team_id = tm.team_id LEFT JOIN users u ON t.creator_id = u.user_id WHERE t.team_id = #{teamId} GROUP BY t.team_id, t.name, t.description, t.creator_id, t.max_members, t.status, t.created_at, t.updated_at, u.username

SELECT u.user_id, u.username, u.avatar, tm.role, tm.joined_at FROM team_members tm INNER JOIN users u ON tm.user_id = u.user_id WHERE tm.team_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY CASE tm.role WHEN 'leader' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, tm.joined_at
SELECT * FROM teams WHERE team_id = #{teamId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT t.team_id, t.name, t.description, t.creator_id, t.max_members, t.status, t.created_at, t.updated_at, u.username AS creator_name, COUNT(tm.user_id) AS current_members FROM teams t LEFT JOIN users u ON t.creator_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON t.team_id = tm.team_id
AND t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND t.status = #{status}
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.name, t.description, t.creator_id, t.max_members, t.status, t.created_at, t.updated_at, u.username ORDER BY t.created_at DESC

SELECT t.team_id, t.name, t.description, t.creator_id, t.max_members, t.status, t.created_at, tm.role, tm.joined_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM team_members tm2 WHERE tm2.team_id = t.team_id) AS current_members FROM team_members tm INNER JOIN teams t ON tm.team_id = t.team_id WHERE tm.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY tm.joined_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM team_members WHERE team_id = #{teamId}
